title: Tens of thousands march against Belgian austerity reforms
summary_full: Belgian unions have been mobilised since Belgian PM Bart De Wever took office early last year against government reforms to the pension and unemployment systems
summary_public: Belgian unions have been mobilised since Belgian PM Bart De Wever took office early last year against government reforms to the pension and unemployment systems
